name: Shenzhen Qixin Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Qixin Group Co., Ltd. provides architectural decoration design and construction services in China and internationally. It undertakes building decoration, building curtain wall, construction mechanical and electrical installation, fire facilities engineering, and electronics and intelligent engineering work projects. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Qixin Construction Group Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Shenzhen Qixin Group Co., Ltd. in July 2019. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
